sentences.arabic: يَزُورُ جَدِّي المُسْتَشْفَى مَرَّةً فِي السَّنَةِ لِإِجْرَاءِ فَحْصٍ طِبِّيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Moj djed posjećuje bolnicu jednom godišnje radi ljekarskog pregleda.
sentences.translationEn: My grandfather visits the hospital once a year for a medical check-up.

sentences.arabic: يَفْحَصُ الطَّبِيبُ ضَغْطَ الدَّمِ وَصِحَّةَ القَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar provjerava njegov krvni pritisak i zdravlje srca.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor checks his blood pressure and heart health.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الفُحُوصَاتُ مُهِمَّةٌ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّتِهِ فِي سِنِّ الشَّيْخُوخَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi pregledi su važni za očuvanje njegovog zdravlja u starosti.
sentences.translationEn: These check-ups are important for maintaining his health in old age.
